---
slug: "research"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    html-math-method: katex
css: styles-dark.css
lightbox: true
---

:::: {#body style="width: 90%; margin: auto; font-weight: normal; text-align: left"}
### **#il[uv]{.underline}bugs photo gallery**

\

::: {layout-ncol="3" layout-valign="top" fig-align="top"}
![#il**uv**bugs X City Nature Challenge BioBlitz home base\
Photo credit: Marielle Hansel Friedman](images/iluvbugsevent.png){group="my-gallery"}

![A caterpillar fluoresces under ultraviolet light\
Photo credit: Grace Horne](images/IMG_4327.png){group="my-gallery"}

![A fawn sphinx caterpillar illuminated by ultraviolet light\
Photo credit: Grace Horne](images/IMG_4328.png){group="my-gallery"}

![A viewing box of a fluorescing millipede at UCD Picnic Day\
Photo credit: Marielle Hansel Friedman](images/glowingbugsexhibitpicnicday2-01.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![Grace Horne and Marielle Hansel Friedman of the Meineke Lab discuss the mechanisms behind fluorescence at UCD Picnic Day\
Photo credit: Kathy Keatley Garvey](images/GraceandMarielle_glowingbugsexhibit_picnicday-02.JPG){group="my-gallery"}
:::

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: center; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
  <button id="uv-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleUVFlashlight()" style="
    background: #3c0090;
    color: #d4aaff;
    border: 2px solid #7a30d0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    letter-spacing: 0.03em;
    transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  ">🔦 Toggle UV flashlight</button>
</div>

<script>
function toggleUVFlashlight() {
  if (window.__uvFlashlight) {
    window.__uvFlashlight.remove();
    delete window.__uvFlashlight;
    document.getElementById('uv-toggle-btn').textContent = '🔦 Toggle UV flashlight';
    return;
  }

  const RADIUS = 160;
  const DARKNESS = 0.92;
  const UV_TINT = "rgba(60, 0, 160, 0.18)";

  const overlay = document.createElement("div");
  Object.assign(overlay.style, {
    position:      "fixed",
    inset:         "0",
    pointerEvents: "none",
    zIndex:        "2147483647",
    transition:    "opacity 0.2s ease",
    mixBlendMode:  "normal",
  });

  let mx = window.innerWidth  / 2;
  let my = window.innerHeight / 2;

  function buildGradient(x, y) {
    return `radial-gradient(
      circle ${RADIUS}px at ${x}px ${y}px,
      transparent 0%,
      ${UV_TINT}   ${RADIUS * 0.6}px,
      rgba(0,0,0,${DARKNESS}) ${RADIUS}px
    )`;
  }

  function onMouseMove(e) {
    mx = e.clientX;
    my = e.clientY;
    overlay.style.background = buildGradient(mx, my);
  }

  overlay.style.background = buildGradient(mx, my);

  try {
    document.documentElement.appendChild(overlay);
  } catch (err) {
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  }

  document.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove, { passive: true });

  window.__uvFlashlight = overlay;
  overlay.remove = function () {
    document.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove);
    (overlay.parentElement || document.documentElement).removeChild(overlay);
  };

  document.getElementById('uv-toggle-btn').textContent = '💡 UV flashlight ON';
}
</script>
```

::::
